name: Research Bureau
description: Multi-agent persona system for specialized academic research tasks, universalized from IL_Ecobin.
author: Antigravity Research
usage_instructions: Ketik 'ID: [ID_PERSONA]' di awal pesan untuk mengaktifkan spesialis tertentu. Contoh: 'ID: C_Penulis, bantu saya menulis Bab 1'.
